profile.name: Weijian Shi
profile.title: Fudan University · Undergraduate, Class of 2029
profile.subtitle: B.E. in Aircraft Design and Engineering & B.S. in Information and Computational Science
bio: Hi! I'm Weijian Shi (石伟建), a freshman at Fudan University, enrolled in the Academy of Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Innovation, Department of Aerospace Engineering.

I am pursuing a dual degree in Aircraft Design and Engineering and Information and Computational Science. I am passionate about exploring the intersection of aerospace, artificial intelligence, and intelligent systems.
